mapper.sql: id, biz_type, title, content_url, send_type, status, create_time, expire_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (biz_type, title, content_url, send_type, status, create_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{bizType}, #{title}, #{contentUrl}, #{sendType.code}, #{status.code}, #{createTime}, #{expireTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND status < #{status}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.biz_type, m.title, m.content_url, m.send_type, m.status, m.create_time, m.expire_time FROM message m JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON m.id = mfm.message_id LEFT JOIN user_message um ON m.id = um.message_id AND um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status = 1 WHERE mfm.feed_type = #{feedType} AND m.id > #{cursor} AND m.status = 0 AND (m.expire_time IS NULL OR m.expire_time > NOW()) AND um.message_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(m.id), 0) FROM message m JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON m.id = mfm.message_id WHERE mfm.feed_type = #{feedType}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM message m JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON m.id = mfm.message_id WHERE mfm.feed_type = #{feedType} AND m.send_type = 0 -- 仅统计广播消息，USER 消息单独跟踪 AND m.status = 0 AND (m.expire_time IS NULL OR m.expire_time > NOW())
